star_3.text: It's a fun game to pass the time: think local fair games like skeeball and balloon pop and coin pusher. There are some issues, especially with the doll catcher (claw game). It will randomly flip upside down so you cannot secure any items. Then it will catch the item on the next turn only to not drop into the collection bin. As you are moving the claw around it will glitch and start to flash or will act as though a barrier or obstacle is holding it from doing anything.

It is a fun game, with the exception of . . . on leap frog, on some levels the clock runs down with zero targets to aim for, then it disqualifies you from moving on. Also the shooting gallery is a far cry from being accurate. and the coin pusher is a complete waste of time, kind of dumb, would love to see something else in that spot.

This is cute, but very buggy. If devs had made only 4 games instead of 6, it would probably run better. The skee ball is very good, the others not so much. Coin dozer is just that...you can doze off playing it. The frog one is not made well. Uninstalling. I really only wanted skee ball.

The concept is good, but some of these games are impossible. In the leap frog one you can't even get past one level as there's no target for you to hit. And the claw game never picks up a prize, it always drops them.
Oddly formatted; didn't fit my screen well, but was still playable. The games are OK, the ads are not too bad, the graphics are strange, the physics are not terrible.

It has been a fun passer of time but now the coin pusher is stuck it's like the pusher bar is invisible and there is no connection between the bar and the coins. It would be. Ice to play it again. Thank You

It was OK at start but once you have 4000 tickets you can just spin the wheel and win win win. Ended up with 250000 tickets then got bored. Also spelling and spacing is amateurish. Good time waster but lacks a goal.
Was working really good was fun. But now the coin pusher part is all bunched up just keeps stacking the coins & throwing them over the rest not pushing any off. I have screen shots.
I like this app. I suggest rollover tries. Like if I get 5 tries on the claw machine and I get the prizes in 3 tries, I'd like my last 2 tries to be added to the next level.

star_5.text: I've installed this game thoughout he years and on several devices. I enjoy playing each game.....BUT......the claw machine needs work. At times when you move the claw to try to grab and collect a prize the claw shakes and turns upside down and I'm not quite sure why?!? I know there is no glitch and the game is meant to mimic reality. I can only hope that you guys will change this. It's quite annoying and not realistic. Hope to see changes soon!!! I still gave a 5 star rating.

Good little games to play. The only problem I have is about the claw/grabber in the Doll Catcher game. It used to not swing so easily before and it's harder to play! And sometimes if it swings while going down to grab, it'll shake and twist around all sorts of ways and ends upside down when it goes back up. It looks like a weird glitch.
